metadata.title: My Body / 我的身体 — 身体部位英语词汇

slides.content:
My Body
我的身体

Learn body parts in English!
用英文认识身体的每个部分

For kids ages 3-6 · 3-6岁
slides.prompt:
风格ID
vector-illustration

Please generate a cover page based on visual balance aesthetics.
Place a large complex 3D glass object in the center, overlaid with bold text:

My Body
我的身体

Learn body parts in English!
用英文认识身体的每个部分

For kids ages 3-6 · 3-6岁

Background with extended aurora waves.

slides.content:
HEAD 头

A happy cartoon child points at their head.

My head is at the top! 头在最上面！

Example: My head hurts. 我头疼。

(cute cartoon kid, big round head, pointing up with both hands)
slides.prompt:
风格ID
vector-illustration

Please generate a content page using Bento grid layout.
Organize the following content in modular rounded rectangle containers.
Container material must be frosted glass with blur effect:

HEAD 头

A happy cartoon child points at their head.

My head is at the top! 头在最上面！

Example: My head hurts. 我头疼。

(cute cartoon kid, big round head, pointing up with both hands)

slides.content:
EYES 眼睛

Two big cartoon eyes looking left and right.

I have two eyes! 我有两只眼睛！

Example: She has big eyes. 她有大眼睛。

(cute cartoon face zoomed in, sparkling round eyes, long eyelashes)
slides.prompt:
风格ID
vector-illustration

Container material must be frosted glass with blur effect:

EYES 眼睛

Two big cartoon eyes looking left and right.

I have two eyes! 我有两只眼睛！

Example: She has big eyes. 她有大眼睛。

(cute cartoon face zoomed in, sparkling round eyes, long eyelashes)

slides.content:
EARS 耳朵

A cartoon child with big round ears.

I have two ears! 我有两只耳朵！

Example: Rabbits have long ears. 兔子耳朵长。

(cute cartoon child, hands cupped behind ears listening)

EARS 耳朵

A cartoon child with big round ears.

I have two ears! 我有两只耳朵！

Example: Rabbits have long ears. 兔子耳朵长。

(cute cartoon child, hands cupped behind ears listening)

slides.content:
NOSE 鼻子

A cartoon child touches their cute little nose.

I have one nose! 我有一个鼻子！

Example: My nose is running. 我流鼻涕了。

(cartoon child pointing at a small button nose, smiling)

slides.content:
MOUTH 嘴巴

A cartoon child opens their mouth wide.

Open your mouth! 张开嘴巴！

Example: Open your mouth. 张开嘴巴。

(cartoon child with mouth open wide, showing teeth, happy expression)

slides.content:
HANDS 手

Two cartoon hands waving hello!

Wash your hands! 洗手！

I have two hands and ten fingers.
我有两只手和十根手指。

(cute cartoon hands with five fingers each, waving cheerfully)

slides.content:
FEET 脚

A cartoon child wiggles their toes!

My feet are cold! 我脚冷！

Special plural: foot → feet (NOT foots!)
特殊复数：foot → feet（不是foots！）

(cartoon child sitting, bare feet up in the air, ten toes wiggling)

slides.content:
SHOULDERS · KNEES · TOES
肩膀 · 膝盖 · 脚趾

Shoulder 肩膀 — the top of your arm
Knee 膝盖 — the middle of your leg
Toe 脚趾 — the end of your foot

(cute cartoon child standing, arrows pointing to shoulder, knee, and toe)

Shoulder 肩膀 — the top of your arm

slides.content:
🎵 Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes 🎵
头、肩膀、膝盖和脚趾

Head, shoulders, knees and toes, knees and toes!
Eyes and ears and mouth and nose...
Head, shoulders, knees and toes, knees and toes!

Sing and point! 唱的时候用手指相应的身体部位！

(cartoon children singing and dancing in a row, pointing at body parts)
slides.prompt:
风格ID
vector-illustration

Container material must be frosted glass with blur effect:

🎵 Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes 🎵
头、肩膀、膝盖和脚趾

Head, shoulders, knees and toes, knees and toes!
Eyes and ears and mouth and nose...
Head, shoulders, knees and toes, knees and toes!

Sing and point! 唱的时候用手指相应的身体部位！

(cartoon children singing and dancing in a row, pointing at body parts)

slides.content:
Let's Play! 一起来玩！

Parent says — Child points!
家长说 — 小朋友指！

👆 Touch your head! 摸你的头！
👂 Point to your ears! 指你的耳朵！
👃 Tap your nose! 拍你的鼻子！
🤲 Show your hands! 举起你的手！

(cartoon family playing together, parent and child laughing and pointing at body parts)
slides.prompt:
风格ID
vector-illustration

Please generate a content page using Bento grid layout.

Container material must be frosted glass with blur effect:

Let's Play! 一起来玩！

Parent says — Child points!
家长说 — 小朋友指！

👆 Touch your head! 摸你的头！
👂 Point to your ears! 指你的耳朵！
👃 Tap your nose! 拍你的鼻子！
🤲 Show your hands! 举起你的手！

(cartoon family playing together, parent and child laughing and pointing at body parts)

slides.content:
You did it! 你学会了！🎉

Body Parts Checklist 词汇总结：
✅ Head 头  ✅ Eyes 眼睛  ✅ Ears 耳朵
✅ Nose 鼻子  ✅ Mouth 嘴巴  ✅ Hands 手
✅ Feet 脚  ✅ Shoulders 肩膀  ✅ Knees 膝盖
✅ Toes 脚趾

Great job! 棒极了！

(happy cartoon child doing a victory pose, confetti and stars all around)
